endpoints.name: Baggage Trip and Contact
endpoints.description: Retrieve passenger trip, contact and baggage details. This service is only accessible for LH privileged partners
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SEARCHID}} with a real searchid.

endpoints.name: All Fares
endpoints.description: Retrieves all available fares for a specific Origin & Destination pair on a given date. Available fares are: One-way and Return for 4U. Return only for OS
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Best Fares
endpoints.description: Retrieve best fares for the requested journey across multiple days or multiple months.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Deep Links
endpoints.description: Returns valid deep links for the provided input parameters
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: LH Deep Links - FFP
endpoints.description: Returns valid LH deep links (FFP - links to flight selection screen on LH.COM)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: LH Deep Links - ITCO
endpoints.description: Returns valid LH deep links (ITCO - links to shopping cart on LH.COM)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fares
endpoints.description: Retrieve all available fares per fare family for a specific Origin & Destination on a given date
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Lowest Fares
endpoints.description: Retrieve lowest fare for a specific Origin & Destination pair on a given date. Available fares are: One-way and Return for 4U. Return only for OS & LH
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Fares Subscriptions
endpoints.description: Create a subscription for best price O&D. Receive regular updates on lowest fares
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: OND Route
endpoints.description: Returns LH route origin & destination information
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DESTINATION}} with a real destination. Replace {{ORIGIN}} with a real origin.

endpoints.name: OND Status
endpoints.description: Returns LH network route status information. Search for recently added or retired routes
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Top OND
endpoints.description: Returns LH Top routes per country or across all countries
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Orders
endpoints.description: Retrieve order by ID and optionally name. This service is only accessible for LH privileged partners
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ORDERID}} with a real orderid. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: Auto Check-In
endpoints.description: Trigger an automatic check-in given a ticket number. This service is only accessible for LH privileged partners
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{TICKETNUMBER}} with a real ticketnumber.

endpoints.name: Price Offers
endpoints.description: Retrieve a best price offer given an origin and destination.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DESTINATION}} with a real destination. Replace {{ORIGIN}} with a real origin.

endpoints.name: Seat Details
endpoints.description: A description of all available seat details by aircraft type. You can retrieve the full set or details for a particular aircraft type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LUFTHANSA_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your LUFTHANSA ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{CABINCODE}} with a real cabincode. Replace {{AIRCRAFTCODE}} with a real aircraftcode.
